texto: Most people, including yourself, apparently, think The Moldau is about a river. It is not. It is a metaphor. It is about the progress of life, from its fragile beginnings through its joys and turbulence and on to its end, its magnificent end.
explicacao: Citação de Gerald Elias sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Most people, including yourself, apparently, think The Moldau is about a river. It is not. It is …” articula reflexao, metaphor, about em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
